name: Supplementation with eicosapentaenoic acid and docosahexaenoic acid reduces high levels of circulating proinflammatory cytokines in aging adults
summary: A randomized controlled study of EPA+DHA supplementation in adults in middle to late adulthood with chronic venous leg ulcers, measuring circulating inflammatory cytokines over 8 weeks.
venue: Prostaglandins, Leukotrienes, and Essential Fatty Acids
